title: Speed Test Live
shortDescription:
Monitor your system's incoming and outgoing network traffic in real time with Speed Test Live. This tool displays the status of your Wi-Fi and Ethernet connections, shows average, minimum, and maximum speeds, and tracks your total download and upload amounts  
all in a user-friendly interface.
description: Speed Test Live is a simple and powerful tool to measure your internet speed in real-time. With one tap, check your download, upload, and ping rates to ensure optimal connection performance. A reliable companion for monitoring your internet anytime, anywhere.
features: Real-Time Traffic Monitoring: Keep track of your system's inbound and outbound network traffic with detailed statistics.
Wi-Fi and Ethernet Status: View the current status of your Wi-Fi and Ethernet connections, including signal strength and connectivity details.
Speed Metrics: Analyze your network performance with average, minimum, and maximum speed indicators.
Data Usage Statistics: Monitor your total download and upload amounts to manage your data consumption effectively.
benefits: Keep technical workflows visible and controlled
Move from task to result with fewer manual steps
Built around wi-Fi and Ethernet Status
extractedFrom: Microsoft Store publisher search and product detail APIs
